_comment: Species: Southern Winged Snake (南翼蛇) from Pursuit of the Truth. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Southern Winged Snake

canonical.appearance: Serpentine body 6 m, two feathered wings, venom-dripping fangs
canonical.size: 6 m adult, 1200 jin; ancient 20 m, 20000 jin
canonical.behavior: Aerial ambush predator; nests on southern cliffs; hunts at dusk
canonical.habitat: Southern Region cliffs, sky-aspected spirit veins
canonical.relationships: Rival of spirit cranes; preyed upon by thunder birds
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: southern_winged_snake — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
